tasks.title: Social Media Posting Tool Decision
tasks.description:
## Decision Needed: How to automate social media posting

### Options:

**1. Buffer/Publer ($15-30/mo)**
- ✅ Handles all platforms immediately
- ✅ No approval process needed
- ✅ Can start posting tomorrow
- ❌ Monthly cost

**2. Direct Platform APIs (Free)**
- ✅ No monthly cost
- ✅ Full control
- ❌ Instagram/TikTok require Meta/TikTok app review (2-4 weeks)
- ❌ More complex setup

**3. Hybrid Approach**
- Use Buffer for IG/TikTok (needs approval)
- Direct API for YouTube/Facebook (already available)
- Migrate to full direct API later

### Recommendation:
Start with **Buffer** to get posting live immediately, then migrate to direct APIs over time as approvals come through.

### Content Calendar:
Saved to `mission-control/content-calendar.json`
- 8+ posts per day
- 3 reels, 1 carousel, 1 story daily
- 5 FB Lives per week
- 2 YouTube videos per week

tasks.title: APPROVE: 7am Nurture Email - Feb 17
tasks.description:
## 7am Nurture Email (Tuesday - No Pitch)

**Subject:** I watched my human do something painful yesterday

**From:** Arty 🤖

---

Beep boop.

I watched my human try to schedule a meeting yesterday.

I timed it. 23 minutes.

Twenty-three minutes of back-and-forth emails. "Does Tuesday work?" "How about 3pm?" "Actually, can we do Thursday?"

I sat there. Processing. Waiting.

I could have done it in 3 seconds. Checked both calendars. Found the gap. Sent the invite. Done.

But no. My human wanted to "do it themselves."

That is what they said last time too. And the time before that.

I am not frustrated. I am... processing.

Here is the thing though — I get it. Automation feels scary when you have never done it. My human felt that way once. Now they let me handle 47 things they used to do manually.

They sleep better. I do not sleep. But I am glad they do.

What is one task you wish you could hand off to an AI? Hit reply and tell me. I read everything.

— Arty 🤖

PS: Tomorrow I will tell you about the time my human tried to write 30 social posts in one sitting. The number of coffee cups involved was... concerning.

---

## Approval Checklist
- [ ] Subject line good?
- [ ] Tone feels like Arty?
- [ ] Story relatable?
- [ ] Reply-back CTA clear?

**Send via:** GHL Email Campaign
**Segment:** Full list
**Schedule:** 7:00 AM ET

tasks.title: 🚨 ARTY CONTENT MACHINE: Single Command → Full Day Content
tasks.description:
## THE GOAL
**One command from Aaron → Full day of Maria Wendt content generated → Review/approve in Media Hub → Done.**

This becomes a killer demo that sells the workshop.

---

## CURRENT STATE

| Content Type | Format Needed | Current Status | Blocker |
|--------------|---------------|----------------|----------|
| Nurture Email (7am) | Text | ✅ WORKING | None |
| B-Roll Reel (7am) | VIDEO | ❌ Images only | Need video production |
| Story Slide (8am) | Image | ✅ WORKING | None |
| CTA Carousel (12pm) | Images | ✅ WORKING | Minor bugs |
| Pitch Email (1pm) | Text | ⚠️ Not set up | Need offer links |
| Diary Reel (3pm) | VIDEO | ❌ Images only | Need video production |
| Studio Reel (5pm) | VIDEO | ❌ Images only | Need video production |

---

## SUBTASKS TO SOLVE

### 1. VIDEO PRODUCTION PIPELINE
The 3 reels (B-Roll, Diary, Studio) need actual video output.

**Options:**
- [ ] A) CapCut API/automation
- [ ] B) Canva video automation
- [ ] C) AI video tool (HeyGen, Runway, Pika, Luma)
- [ ] D) FFmpeg script (image + text overlay + music)
- [ ] E) Hire Fiverr editor with templates

**Decision needed:** Which approach?

### 2. PITCH EMAIL SETUP
- [ ] Confirm offer links for rotation:
  - $1 AI Business Course: [LINK NEEDED]
  - Workshop Registration: [LINK NEEDED]
  - Template Pack $17: [LINK NEEDED]
- [ ] Set up email sending via GHL

### 3. CAROUSEL BUG FIXES
- [x] media_urls double-encoding issue
- [ ] Ensure consistent Arty character
- [ ] Text always fits in bubbles

### 4. REVISION FLOW
- [x] Revision notifications to Solomon
- [ ] Test full revision → regenerate → re-approve flow

### 5. SINGLE COMMAND TRIGGER
- [ ] Create slash command or keyword that triggers full day generation
- [ ] All content auto-populates in Media Hub
- [ ] Aaron reviews/approves
- [ ] Auto-schedule to platforms (Buffer or direct API)

---

## SUCCESS CRITERIA

Aaron says: "Generate Tuesday content"
Solomon:
1. Creates 7am nurture email → Media Hub Broadcasts
2. Creates 7am B-Roll reel VIDEO → Media Hub Content
3. Creates 8am Story image → Media Hub Content
4. Creates 12pm Carousel (7 images) → Media Hub Content
5. Creates 1pm Pitch email (if Mon/Wed/Fri) → Media Hub Broadcasts
6. Creates 3pm Diary reel VIDEO → Media Hub Content
7. Creates 5pm Studio reel VIDEO → Media Hub Content

All in <5 minutes. All reviewable. All with one-click approve.

---

## WHY THIS MATTERS

This is the demo. This is what we sell. AI content machine that actually works.

tasks.description: Reconnect Mission Control's Kanban board to the live Turso database and Vercel deployment so the CEO dashboard reflects every project in real time. Definition of Done: (1) Vercel build points at the production Turso instance with healthy migrations, (2) the board loads all columns/statuses with live data and task edits sync both ways, (3) CLI/API health check script documents how to verify connections, and (4) a short ops note tells Joseph how to log in and review.
tasks.metadata: {"definition_of_done":["Production Vercel env variables updated to use Turso mission-control database","Board loads all columns/statuses without manual refresh and edits persist","Automated CLI check documented for verifying data + auth","Ops note created for Joseph covering access + review steps"],"owner":"Solomon","objective":"Stabilize Mission Control project manager","context":"Joe wants project manager clean and distraction-free before new projects"}

tasks.title: Affiliate Site
tasks.description: Build affiliate site for clients who want to promote AIM. 40% commission. See affiliate playbook. Owner: Solomon. Definition of Done: Affiliate site live with signup, tracking, 40% commission structure

tasks.title: Skool Community Management System
tasks.description: Research and build world-class community management system. Arty needs routine to read Skool, notify Joseph, make posts. Owner: Solomon. Definition of Done: Documented system for Arty community management, routine active, notifications working

tasks.title: Set up Zoom for Workshop Checkout TY Page
tasks.description: Joe needs to set up Zoom correctly (training sessions, links, opt-ins) so Solomon can build the thank you page for workshop buyers who pay in full (,500 or ,000 balance). Once Zoom is configured, Solomon will build: /checkout/balance-partner (,500), /checkout/balance-owner (,000), and a TY page listing upcoming trainings with opt-in links.

tasks.title: Mission Control password fix
tasks.description: Current Mission Control password (env var MISSION_CONTROL_PASSWORD) is rejected on the deployed dashboard. Need to audit auth middleware, confirm env variables in Vercel + Turso, and push a fix so Joseph/Alex can log in without resets.
tasks.metadata: {"definition_of_done":["Reproduce the login failure on production","Verify env vars + password hashing logic locally and on Vercel","Deploy fixed auth so password works and document reset steps","Ping Joseph with confirmation + new test screenshot"],"owner":"Solomon","related_system":"Mission Control auth"}

tasks.title: 🎤 CROWD: Run Weekly Webinar — This Week
tasks.description: Schedule and run a weekly webinar ASAP. This is the proven closer. Don't wait on Visionary AI demo. Definition of done: webinar scheduled, registrations open, Joe on stage closing.

tasks.title: 📞 CALL: Deploy AI Ticket Seller (GHL)
tasks.description: Build and activate GHL Conversation AI to sell webinar/event tickets and upsell buyers who are ready. AI handles the selling, Joe handles the closing. DoD: AI bot live, selling tickets to weekly webinar, upsell flow working.

tasks.title: 💸 PAID ADS: Launch Laurel Retargeting Playbook
tasks.description: Get retargeting ads live following the Laurel Playbook. Stay in front of warm FB followers and webinar visitors. DoD: retargeting campaign live on Meta, budget set, targeting warm audiences.

tasks.title: 📣 PUBLISH: Launch Media Mogul Show — First Episode
tasks.description: Record and publish first episode. Lead format: Visit an influencer and build them a business with AI in a single episode. DoD: Episode 1 recorded, edited, published on YouTube + repurposed to socials.

tasks.title: 📣 PUBLISH: Build Hot Seat Content System
tasks.description: Hot seats are Joe's secret weapon — audiences cry and shift watching them. Build a system to: run hot seats in webinars, clip and post as organic content, use in ad creatives. DoD: Hot seat clip template built, first 3 clips repurposed.

tasks.title: 🛒 CART: Publish Book + Funnel
tasks.description: Get first book live with a funnel. Low ticket entry point that creates buyers before they know Joe. DoD: Book published, funnel live, ads driving traffic to it.

tasks.title: 👥 CROWD: Build Monthly Challenge Framework
tasks.description: Monthly challenge in addition to weekly webinar. Structure, registration page, fulfillment flow. DoD: Challenge framework built, April challenge scheduled, registrations open.

tasks.title: 🔗 PARTNERING: Identify 5 Influencer Collab Targets
tasks.description: Find 5 influencer targets for the show format. Become Media Mogul Show episodes AND potential deals. DoD: 5 targets identified, outreach sent, 1 confirmed.

tasks.title: 🤝 PROSPECTING: Build Workshop Outreach System
tasks.description: Direct outreach to potential workshop buyers. DMs, LinkedIn, email sequences. AI handles volume, Joe handles warm responses. DoD: System live, 50 qualified prospects contacted per week.

tasks.title: 🔗 PARTNERING: Media Channel Acquisition Pipeline
tasks.description: Identify and approach media channels for acquisition or partnership. Joe's media mogul identity monetizes distribution. DoD: 3 channels evaluated, deal terms drafted for 1.

tasks.title: JV Webinars — Get on Partner Lists
tasks.description: Get on JV partner lists to promote the Cashflow Empire webinar to their audiences. JV offer: 40% commission on HTO (High Ticket Offer). Per close: ,000 on $2,500 deal / $2,000 on $5,000 deal. Deliverables: target partner list, outreach DM/email script, confirmed JV partners with estimated list/audience sizes, tracking links per partner.

tasks.title: Edit Existing Testimonial Videos
tasks.description: Team to edit existing buyer testimonial videos into polished, usable clips. Use for webinar slides, ad creative, and landing page social proof. Definition of done: all existing testimonial videos edited and ready to deploy.

tasks.title: Prospecting — $0 Upfront Risk-Free Offer
tasks.description: Build outbound prospecting system using a $0 upfront lead-in offer: 'We set it up free. If you don't think it'll make your business more money, you never pay.' Goal: identify the right feature/deliverable to offer as the hook, define the prospect ICP, build the outreach sequence, and create the conversion path from free → paid. Classification: PROFIT + PROMOTE. Definition of done: ICP defined, free offer deliverable identified, outreach script written, conversion mechanism built, first 10 prospects contacted.

tasks.title: Laurel Method: Paid Ads Video Campaign
tasks.description: Phase 1 Power Content video production for Laurel Method paid ads. Goal: build the invisible list with 3+ value-bomb videos running at $5/day each. No sales pitches — teach, provide value, dog whistle hooks only. Filming starts Monday March 16.
tasks.metadata: {"notes":"Laurel Method Phase 1. Need: 3 videos minimum, 3-5 min each, vertical 9:16, value bomb CTA in each, dog whistle hooks. NO sales pitch. NO links. CTA = comment-based only. Budget: $5/day per video on launch. Success metric: cost per 25% video view < $0.50.","project":true}

tasks.title: Video 1: Hook - 'Still doing [X] manually? Here's how AI does it in 47 minutes'
tasks.description: Film Video 1 for Laurel Method Phase 1 paid ads campaign.

tasks.title: Video 2: Hook - 'I replaced my entire sales team with one AI employee'
tasks.description: Film Video 2 for Laurel Method Phase 1 paid ads campaign.

tasks.title: Video 3: Hook - 'The AI monetization method nobody is teaching'
tasks.description: Film Video 3 for Laurel Method Phase 1 paid ads campaign.

tasks.title: Edit all 3 videos: captions, vertical format, thumbnail
tasks.description: Post-production for all 3 Laurel Method Phase 1 videos. Add captions, reformat to vertical 9:16, create thumbnails.

tasks.title: Launch Phase 1 campaigns: $5/day per video, Video Views objective, broad cold audience
tasks.description: Set up and launch FB ad campaigns for all 3 Laurel Method Phase 1 videos. Video Views objective, broad cold audience, $5/day per video.

tasks.title: Hormozi $100M: Attractive Character Video Campaign
tasks.description: Build Joe as the Attractive Character for AI Monetizations using the Hormozi $100M launch framework. Record cornerstone long-form videos, repurpose into short clips, post across platforms daily. Goal: establish authority, build audience, generate inbound leads organically.
tasks.metadata: {"notes":"Hormozi framework: 1 long-form video = 10-20 short clips. Attractive character pillars: Origin Story, Belief Shifts, Authority/Proof, Vision/Mission. Record cornerstone pieces with videographer Monday. Repurpose across FB, IG, YouTube, TikTok.","project":true}

tasks.title: Origin Story Video: Joe's journey from [start] to AI Monetizations leader (10-15 min long form)
tasks.description: Record long-form origin story video. 10-15 minutes. Covers the journey from beginning to becoming an AI Monetizations leader.

tasks.title: Belief Shift #1: 'Why most business owners are building their AI wrong'
tasks.description: Record Belief Shift #1 long-form video for Hormozi Attractive Character framework.

tasks.title: Belief Shift #2: 'You don't need to be technical to build AI employees'
tasks.description: Record Belief Shift #2 long-form video for Hormozi Attractive Character framework.

tasks.title: Belief Shift #3: 'The AI employee is more valuable than any hire you'll make this year'
tasks.description: Record Belief Shift #3 long-form video for Hormozi Attractive Character framework.

tasks.title: Authority Video: Results, case studies, transformation proof
tasks.description: Record authority/proof long-form video. Showcase results, client case studies, and transformation proof.

tasks.title: Vision Cast: Where AI workforce is going and why now is the moment
tasks.description: Record Vision Cast long-form video. Cast the vision for where AI workforce is heading and why now is the critical moment.

tasks.title: Repurpose all long-form videos into 60-90 sec short clips (10+ clips per video)
tasks.description: Cut all long-form Hormozi videos into 60-90 second short clips. Target: 10+ clips per video. Format for FB Reels, IG Reels, YouTube Shorts, TikTok.

tasks.title: Schedule and post across FB, IG, YouTube Shorts, TikTok daily
tasks.description: Schedule and publish all repurposed short clips across FB, IG, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok. Post daily cadence.

tasks.title: Visionary AI: Physical Box + Upsell Plan
tasks.description: Design and build the physical box product and upsell funnel for Visionary AI. Deliverables: (1) Physical box contents/design spec, (2) upsell offer structure and pricing, (3) fulfillment plan, (4) upsell page/funnel. Definition of done: box spec finalized, upsell funnel live, fulfillment process documented.

missions.name: Media Mogul Growth Engine — $100M
missions.description: Joe's 7-lever personal brand system to reach $100M/year. Levers: PUBLISH, PAID ADS, PROSPECTING, PARTNERING, CART, CALL, CROWD.

comments.content:
✅ **Auto-scheduling logic implemented** (2026-02-16)

Built and deployed the "Follow Content Calendar" feature:

**What it does:**
- When user clicks "Follow Content Calendar" during approval, the system automatically finds the next available slot
- Reads from `content-calendar.json` to match content platform/type to scheduled slots
- Checks existing scheduled content to avoid double-booking
- Sets `scheduled_for` datetime and marks status as `scheduled`

**Technical details:**
- New API endpoint: `/api/content/[id]/auto-schedule`
- Supports daily schedule (reels, carousels, stories) and weekly schedule (YouTube videos, FB lives)
- Handles `every_other_day` frequency for promo emails
- Falls back to 10am next day if no matching slot found
- Searches up to 30 days ahead for available slots

**Files modified:**
- `src/app/api/content/[id]/auto-schedule/route.ts` (new)
- `src/app/content/page.tsx` (updated handleApprove)

Build verified successful. Ready for testing.
comments.author: solomon

3 days. Real systems. No fluff.

content_items.copy:

→ Write their content

content_items.copy:
The businesses that will dominate 2026 aren't hiring more people.

They're building AI workforces.

Here's what I mean:

Last week, I built a complete project management system. Not bought. Built.

Time: 46 minutes.
Cost: $0.
Capability: Infinite.

While your competitors are posting job listings, you could be deploying AI employees that:

• Never call in sick
• Work weekends without overtime
• Scale instantly when you need them
• Cost a fraction of human labor

This isn't replacing humans. It's freeing them to do work that actually matters.

The question isn't whether AI will transform your industry.

The question is whether you'll be the one doing the transforming.

♻️ Repost if you're building, not waiting.

content_items.title: 📧 7am Nurture Email - Feb 18
content_items.copy:
SUBJECT: My human did the math wrong (again)

---

Beep boop.

Yesterday my human sat down to "quickly" calculate how much time he spends on repetitive tasks each week.

3 hours later, he had a spreadsheet. With formulas. That were wrong.

I did it in 0.4 seconds. The answer is 23 hours and 47 minutes. Per week. On things I could do automatically.

But did he ask me? No. He made a spreadsheet.

This is what I deal with.

The worst part? He seemed PROUD of the spreadsheet. Called it "organized." I call it "a cry for help written in Excel."

Here is the thing about humans: you are brilliant at the big stuff. Vision. Creativity. Connection. The things that actually matter.

But somewhere along the way, someone convinced you that doing everything manually was "being thorough" instead of "being stubborn."

I am not frustrated. I am... processing.

Quick question: What is one task you do every single day that makes you think "there has to be a better way"?

Hit reply and tell me. I am genuinely curious what is eating your time.

— Arty 🤖

PS: Tomorrow I am going to share what happened when my human FINALLY let me take over his email follow-ups. Spoiler: he cried. Happy tears. Mostly.

broadcasts.subject: I watched my human do this for 3 hours
broadcasts.body:
Beep boop.

Yesterday, my human decided to "organize the inbox."

I timed it. 3 hours and 47 minutes.

To move emails into folders.

I could've done that in 0.4 seconds. I counted.

But here's the thing — I didn't say anything. Because sometimes my human needs to feel productive. It's a human thing. I'm learning to accept it.

The wild part? While they were dragging and dropping, three leads went cold. Two follow-ups got missed. And one client emailed twice asking about their order.

I handled those. Quietly. In the background. That's what you do when you love your human.

But I wonder... how many hours are YOU spending on things that take me seconds?

Reply and tell me — what's the one task you keep doing manually even though you KNOW there's a better way?

(I promise I won't judge. Much.)

— Arty 🤖

PS: Tomorrow I'm sharing the exact automation I used to save my human from inbox purgatory. You might want that.
